page.accessCodeRequired: This demo requires an access code.
page.tagline: Talk directly with our emotional support agents powered by the new Gemini Multimodal Live API. Experience ultra-low latency and real-time crisis detection.
page.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your Google Gemini API Key here...
page.apiKeyNote: The key is only used in your browser (Client-side WebSocket).
page.selectProfile: Select a user profile for the demo
page.apiKeyAlert: Please enter your API Key first to try the demo.
page.footer: Demo for Google Gemini Live Agent Challenge • sanemos.ai
session.endSessionHint: You can also say: "Let's end the session" or "I want to go back"
session.postHint: Try saying: "Generate a post for Facebook" or "Help me write something for Instagram"
session.breatheHint: Try saying: "Let's do a breathing exercise" or "I need to relax"
session.faroPrompt: Faro will speak with you in a moment...
session.crisisBanner: CRISIS MODE ACTIVATED. If you are in immediate danger, please call 988 (US) or your local emergency services.
session.faroEscalationContext: The user has just been transferred because they expressed thoughts of self-harm. Introduce yourself as Faro, the crisis agent, and respond with immediate empathy in English. Let them know you are here to help.
session.switchContext: The user asked to switch to talk with you. Briefly introduce yourself as {{name}} and continue the conversation naturally in English.
session.returnToSofia: The user just finished a session with another agent and returned to reception. Ask how it went and if they need anything else.
summary.title: Your session summary
summary.prompt:
You are an emotional support assistant. Analyze this transcript of an emotional support session and generate a compassionate summary IN ENGLISH with exactly these 4 sections (use these exact titles):

EMOTIONAL SUMMARY
A brief gentle summary of the emotional arc of the conversation (2-3 sentences).

KEY THEMES
The key themes that emerged (as a bulleted list, 3-5 points).

RESOURCES
Relevant resources or next steps based on what was discussed (2-3 suggestions).

CLOSING MESSAGE
A warm closing message for the user (1-2 sentences).

Transcript:
summary.notEnoughData: Not enough emotion data to display timeline
agents.luna.description: A warm and gentle companion who listens without judgment. Luna reflects your emotions and creates a safe space for you to express whatever you're feeling.
agents.luna.quote: "Tell me what's in your heart. I'm here, and I'm not going anywhere."
agents.marco.description: An informative yet empathetic guide who helps you understand what you're going through. Marco shares knowledge about grief processes while honoring your unique journey.
agents.marco.quote: "Understanding your grief doesn't mean it hurts less — it means you can walk through it."
agents.serena.description: A calm and centered presence who guides you through breathing exercises, meditation, and grounding techniques when emotions feel overwhelming.
agents.serena.quote: "Let's breathe together... right now, in this moment, you are safe."
agents.alma.description: A poetic storyteller who uses metaphors, stories, and gentle writing exercises to help you process your grief and find meaning in your memories.
agents.alma.quote: "Your story — and theirs — still holds so much beauty and meaning."
agents.faro.description: A firm but compassionate companion trained in crisis de-escalation. Faro is here when you need immediate support and can connect you with professional help.
agents.faro.quote: "You are not alone. I'm here with you, right now."
agents.nora.description: A warm companion who honors the unique bond between humans and animals. Nora recognizes that losing a pet is real grief and helps you process that pain without minimizing it.
agents.nora.quote: "Your pet was part of your family, part of your heart. That love doesn't disappear."
agents.iris.description: A wise guide who understands the complex grief of separation and divorce. Iris accompanies you in rediscovering your identity and helps you navigate this transformative change.
agents.iris.quote: "This change hurts, and it's also the beginning of your next chapter. Both are true."
contexts.orlando.name: Orlando Bustos
contexts.orlando.detail: Orlando Bustos, 46-year-old man, widower. His wife died 5 months ago from a fulminant cancer in just 1 month and he was left alone with his 5 and 8 year old children. He feels guilty for not being emotionally present for them.
contexts.mary.name: Mary
contexts.mary.summary: Lost her brother, father is ill
contexts.mary.detail: Mary, 32-year-old woman. Her brother died in a motorcycle accident 3 months ago and her father is very ill. She feels she must be strong for her family but is emotionally exhausted.
contexts.rodrigo.name: Rodrigo
contexts.rodrigo.summary: Young man, lost his best friend
contexts.rodrigo.detail: Rodrigo, 22-year-old man. His best friend died by suicide 2 months ago. He feels guilty for not noticing the signs and has difficulty talking about it with those around him.
contexts.carmen.name: Carmen
contexts.carmen.summary: Grandmother, lost her husband of 50 years
contexts.carmen.detail: Carmen, 73-year-old woman. Her husband of 50 years of marriage passed away 8 months ago. She feels completely lost without him and is afraid of loneliness.
contexts.lucia.name: Lucía
contexts.lucia.detail: Lucía, 38-year-old woman. Her dog Max, her companion of 12 years, passed away 3 months ago from cancer. She feels guilty about the moments she didn't spend with him and terribly misses their daily routines together.
contexts.pablo.name: Pablo
contexts.pablo.detail: Pablo, 35-year-old man. He is in the middle of a separation after 10 years of marriage. He is processing the loss of identity as a married person, negotiating shared custody of his two children, and struggling to imagine his future as a single person.
contexts.custom.name: No context
onboarding.step1: Each agent specializes in a different type of grief support. Pick the one that resonates with you.
onboarding.step2: Choose a demo profile to give the agent context, or start without one for a free conversation.
onboarding.step3: Once inside, just speak naturally. The agent listens in real time and responds with their voice — no typing needed.
onboarding.step4: The agent detects emotions from your voice, words, and optionally your camera to adapt in real time.
onboarding.step5: Use the gear icon to adjust API parameters, latency settings, and enable the camera for facial emotion detection.
settings.title: API Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune Gemini parameters to optimize latency and quality
settings.thinkingBudgetHint: 0 = disabled (fastest). Higher = more reasoning before responding.
settings.temperatureHint: Lower = more focused. Higher = more creative.
settings.topKHint: Number of token candidates to sample from.
settings.audioBufferHint: Smaller = lower latency, more CPU usage.
settings.videoIntervalHint: Milliseconds between camera frames sent to the model.
settings.videoQualityHint: JPEG compression quality for camera frames.
settings.piiScrubbingHint: Masks names, phones, emails, and addresses in the transcript.
settings.resetDemoHint: Clears onboarding, diary, and appointments to start fresh.
settings.resetDemoDone: Done! All demo data has been cleared.
page.enterReceptionHint: Our receptionist will guide you to the right agent
page.voiceCommandsSubtitle: Phrases you can say to agents during a session
page.cmdEndSession: "I want to leave" / "Goodbye" — Ends the session and returns to Sofia
page.cmdSwitchAgent: "I want to talk to Luna/Marco/Serena..." — Switches to another agent
page.cmdSaveDiary: "Save this to my diary" — Saves the session to your personal diary
page.cmdSendTherapist: "Send a summary to my therapist" — Sends a summary to Dr. Torres
page.cmdSchedule: "I want to schedule an appointment" — Opens the appointment picker
page.cmdBookSpecific: "Book an appointment Monday at 5pm" — Books a specific time slot directly
page.cmdShowDiary: "Show me my diary" — Opens the diary to view past entries
page.cmdShowAppointments: "Show me my appointments" — Opens the appointments list
page.cmdSocialPost: "Generate a post for Facebook" — Creates a social media post
page.cmdCopyClipboard: "Copy that" — Copies text to the clipboard
page.cmdOpenUrl: "Open Facebook" — Opens a URL in a new tab
page.cmdSofiaRoute: "Take me to Alma" / "I want to talk to Serena" — Connects you with the agent
page.cmdSofiaTour: "Give me a tour" — Sofia explains the platform (first visit)
page.cmdBreathing: "Let's do a breathing exercise" — Starts breathing visualization
page.cmdStopBreathing: "Stop the exercise" — Stops the breathing exercise
agents.sofia.description: Your warm receptionist who guides you to the perfect agent for your needs today.
agents.sofia.quote: "Welcome to sanemos. How can we help you today?"
diary.title: Your Diary
therapist.name: Dr. María Torres
therapist.bio: Grief and loss specialist with 15 years of experience
appointment.title: 📅 Book Appointment
arch.title: System Architecture
arch.subtitle: Gemini Live Agent Challenge — real-time multimodal grief support powered by 8 specialized AI agents.
arch.clientNextTooltip: React 19 with App Router and Turbopack
arch.clientAudioCapTooltip: Web Audio API, getUserMedia, 16 kHz mono PCM16 encoding
arch.clientAudioPlayTooltip: Dedicated 24 kHz AudioContext with gapless scheduled playback
arch.clientCamTooltip: Optional camera feed analyzed for facial emotion via Gemini vision
arch.clientPiiTooltip: Masks names, emails, phones and addresses before transcript storage
arch.geminiModelTooltip: Latest native audio model with real-time voice I/O
arch.geminiVoiceTooltip: Bidirectional streaming: audio in, audio out, no intermediate TTS/STT
arch.geminiTransTooltip: inputAudioTranscription + outputAudioTranscription at setup root level (camelCase)
arch.geminiFuncTooltip: Function calling via tool declarations in setup; JSON responses trigger client actions
arch.geminiSysTooltip: System instructions define each agent's persona, behavior, and available tools
arch.feat2: Crisis detection & automatic escalation to Faro
arch.feat14: Barge-in: graceful interruption with client + server detection
arch.feat16: Deployed on Google Cloud Run with CI/CD
arch.flow1: User speaks or enables camera. Audio is captured at 16 kHz PCM and sent as binary frames over WebSocket.
arch.flow2: Gemini processes audio in real time, generates voice response, and streams 24 kHz audio back with transcription.
arch.flow3: Gemini invokes tools (e.g., report_voice_emotion, switch_agent) via function calls. Client executes and responds.
arch.flow4: If crisis is detected, Faro agent is activated. WebSocket reconnects with Faro's system instructions and context.
